title: Research → conviction → spec → build.
description: I never start with code. I start with the problem, validate the insight, write a full spec, then execute with conviction. The spec isn't a formality — it's how I compress months of wrong turns into hours of right ones.

title: Build yourself out of it.
description: Every system I design, I design my own removal into. Autonomous infrastructure isn't a nice-to-have — it's the exit condition. If it still needs me to run, it's not done.

title: Ship in days, not sprints.
description: North went from `npx create-expo-app` to App Store submission in 7 days. AI systems handle the scaffolding. I handle the judgment. Speed is a design choice.

title: Products that people actually pay for.
description: I think in users, not features. Every product decision runs through a filter: does this get someone to pay, stay, or refer? If not, it doesn't ship.
